description: A secure, efficient, and intelligent MySQL server for the Model Context Protocol
name: io.github.andezdev/tokenlite-mysql-mcp

environmentVariables.description: MySQL Host address (defaults to localhost)
environmentVariables.name: DB_HOST

environmentVariables.description: MySQL Port (defaults to 3306)
environmentVariables.name: DB_PORT

environmentVariables.description: MySQL Username (defaults to root)
environmentVariables.name: DB_USER

environmentVariables.description: MySQL Password (defaults to empty string)
environmentVariables.name: DB_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: MySQL Database name
environmentVariables.name: DB_NAME

environmentVariables.description: EXPLAIN guardrail: max estimated rows for unindexed full table scans before blocking (defaults to 1000). MCP_SAFE_QUERY_MAX_ROWS is a deprecated alias.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_EXPLAIN_MAX_SCAN_ROWS

environmentVariables.description: Max rows returned per SELECT; injected as LIMIT at the AST level (defaults to 500)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_QUERY_ROW_LIMIT

environmentVariables.description: Deprecated alias for MCP_EXPLAIN_MAX_SCAN_ROWS
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SAFE_QUERY_MAX_ROWS

environmentVariables.description: Enable or disable the EXPLAIN guardrail (defaults to true)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SAFE_QUERY_ENABLE_BLOCKING

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your custom metadata.json dictionary
environmentVariables.name: MCP_METADATA_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your custom templates.json pre-approved queries
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TEMPLATES_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Prefix for tool names, e.g., to run multiple instances (defaults to DB_NAME, e.g. mydb_). Only set to override.
environmentVariables.name: TOOL_PREFIX

environmentVariables.description: Max tool invocations per minute, sliding window (defaults to 60). Set to 0 to disable.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_RATE_LIMIT_RPM

environmentVariables.description: Max execution time for a query in milliseconds to protect against DoS (defaults to 15000)
environmentVariables.name: MYSQL_QUERY_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Max concurrent pool connections (defaults to 10)
environmentVariables.name: MYSQL_CONNECTION_LIMIT

environmentVariables.description: Max time to wait for a connection socket to establish in milliseconds (defaults to 10000)
environmentVariables.name: MYSQL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Max retries on transient connection errors (defaults to 3)
environmentVariables.name: MYSQL_RETRY_ATTEMPTS

environmentVariables.description: Base delay in milliseconds for exponential backoff between retries (defaults to 1000)
environmentVariables.name: MYSQL_RETRY_DELAY_MS

environmentVariables.description: Max queued requests when all pool connections are busy to prevent memory leak (defaults to 50)
environmentVariables.name: MYSQL_QUEUE_LIMIT

environmentVariables.description: Time-to-live in seconds for cached DDL statements (defaults to 60)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_DDL_CACHE_TTL

environmentVariables.description: Minimum severity level for MCP log notifications (defaults to info). Levels: debug, info, notice, warning, error, critical, alert, emergency
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Enable INSERT and REPLACE queries (defaults to false)
environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_INSERT_OPERATION

environmentVariables.description: Enable UPDATE queries (defaults to false)
environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_UPDATE_OPERATION

environmentVariables.description: Enable DELETE and TRUNCATE queries (defaults to false)
environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_DELETE_OPERATION

environmentVariables.description: Enable Data Definition Language queries like CREATE, ALTER, DROP, RENAME (defaults to false)
environmentVariables.name: ALLOW_DDL_OPERATION

environmentVariables.description: Enable TLS for the MySQL connection (defaults to false)
environmentVariables.name: DB_SSL

environmentVariables.description: Reject self-signed or untrusted TLS certificates when DB_SSL is true (defaults to true)
environmentVariables.name: DB_SSL_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED
